description: Source ownership manifest for the TalentSphere-Unified repository. Paths are relative to this directory unless they begin with ../.

orphanedMavenModules.reason: ADR-004 accepts one messaging domain boundary. The service has a pom.xml and source tree, but the root Maven reactor does not include services/chat-service, and Gateway/deployment references remain intentionally removed.
orphanedMavenModules.requiredResolution: Retire services/chat-service or merge useful realtime adapter code into messaging-service after migration validation; do not add it to the reactor without a superseding ADR-004 decision.

infrastructure.note: Module references and frontend workspace bind mounts are validated by npm run validate:infrastructure-manifest; Docker runtime remains unverified.
Missing analytics-service and email-service references were removed; module references are validated by npm run validate:infrastructure-manifest; Docker runtime remains unverified.
Base service resources and API Gateway lb:// targets are validated against active deployable modules by npm run validate:infrastructure-manifest; cluster runtime remains unverified.
Current schema authority workspace marker and limitations for migration-first Supabase/Postgres rebuild work.
Initial migration baseline copied from supabase-schema.sql and validated by npm run validate:schema-migrations until the baseline is decomposed into smaller ordered migrations.

Source-level critical dashboard catalog validated by npm run validate:observability-contract; deployed dashboard provisioning remains unverified.

tooling.note: Local setup helper anchored at the repository root; installs root npm workspace dependencies, labels apps/backend as a non-runnable ADR-002 target shell, and points backend validation at the current root Maven reactor.
